observable.visual_notes: Gameplay montage showing rapid resource accumulation and kingdom expansion. Large numbers appear on screen frequently.

interpretation.hypothesized_strategy: Use visible rapid progression to promise low-friction reward loops for idle players.
why_it_might_work: Immediate payoff shown within first 3 seconds
Large numbers create strong dopamine signaling
No complexity barrier — tap to win framing is clear
interpretation.likely_target_player: Casual idle players who respond to visible progression and numeric rewards.
interpretation.competitive_positioning_guess: Competes on satisfying progression speed rather than depth or narrative.

evidence.note: Kingdom shown in ruins at start, then rapid build-up begins immediately.
Resource counters increase rapidly with overlaid level-up text.
Download CTA appears over final kingdom showcase.
